title: Evangelion 20 on NTV August 26
wikitext:
[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Fri Jul 01, 2011 2:35 pm Well they just announced that they are going to air 2.22/破 in Japan on TV on August 26th (8/26) for the Friday night movie (金曜ロードショー): http://www.ntv.co.jp/kinro/eva/index.html . Perhaps they will announce some Q news then. Edit: actually, can someone translate this footnote better than I can? It seems to imply there will be something mentioned at the end of the movie after mentioning that when 1.0/序 played as the Friday night movie it was at the same time 2.0/破 was released in the theater and that since 破 is now being aired on TV that it will coincide with the restart (再起動) of the movie series (I think?). There's a note to make sure to watch to the end of the movie (but maybe that refers to the same Q preview that played in the theater): "前回『金曜ロードショー』で『序』を放送した時は、『破』の公開時期だったこともあり大変好評でした。今回の『破』のテレビ放送も『新劇場版』シリーズ再起動のきっかけになれればいいと考えています。劇場で見た方も必ず“ 最後まで ”ご覧ください！"

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Jul 01, 2011 3:57 pm EVA 2.22!? AIRING ON NHK!? ON MY BIRTHDAY?! FUCK YEAH!

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Fri Jul 01, 2011 4:00 pm They're gonna air Evangelion: 2.0 just now? I thought they aired it in Japan a long time ago... I mean... I saw Evangelion 2.22 on TV ( dubbed ) on January 1st of this year... Bye

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Jul 01, 2011 4:05 pm Viking wrote: They're gonna air Evangelion: 2.0 just now? I thought they aired it in Japan a long time ago... I mean... I saw Evangelion 2.22 on TV ( dubbed ) on January 1st of this year... Bye

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jul 01, 2011 4:09 pm It was aired by Rai (Italian national broadcaster) around that time. Viking has "North Adriatic Sea" as location, do you live in Italy?

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Jul 01, 2011 4:16 pm No. In the USA.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jul 01, 2011 4:18 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: No. In the USA.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Jul 01, 2011 9:46 pm I saw the news on 2ch too, but since I no longer live in Japan, nothing much for me to do... JoeD80 wrote: Edit: actually, can someone translate this footnote better than I can? It seems to imply there will be something mentioned at the end of the movie after mentioning that when 1.0/序 played as the Friday night movie it was at the same time 2.0/破 was released in the theater and that since 破 is now being aired on TV that it will coincide with the restart (再起動) of the movie series (I think?). There's a note to make sure to watch to the end of the movie (but maybe that refers to the same Q preview that played in the theater): "前回『金曜ロードショー』で『序』を放送した時は、『破』の公開時期だったこともあり大変好評でした。今回の『破』のテレビ放送も『新劇場版』シリーズ再起動のきっかけになれればいいと考えています。劇場で見た方も必ず“ 最後まで ”ご覧ください！"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 01, 2011 11:01 pm Ornette already beat me to the punch by explaining this better on the front page: http://www.evageeks.org/2011/07/evangelion-2-0-tv-broadcast/ BUT: Just like with the 1.01's TV airing, guess what this should mean for the 3.0 preview when 2.22 airs on TV? Actual footage from the film proper, not just a mock-up. The information says "watch the ending" which is also what was mentioned when they changed 2.0's preview after 1.01 aired on Japanese TV: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/07/evangelion-1-01-on-ntv-this-friday/ Now that 2.22 showing on Japanese TV, it must be the same thing. To compare and contrast, 2.0's Next Time Preview from 1.01/1.11: http://www.veoh.com/watch/v4232631ygTGakQQ (Ignore the poor quality. Better quality should be on your DVDs/BDs. ) Versus 1.01's TV Version of 2.0's Next Time Preview: http://www.mediafire.com/?5ymjmoynjzi Regardless, I really hope this means Anno WAS sincere with his "Please wait a little longer" comment in June 2011 Newtype Japan. And I'm assuming whenever 3.33 would air on Japanese TV, there would be a similar format of actual versus mock-up footage for 4.0 (heh, I can only imagine what batshit insanity will be thrown at us there) .

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Jul 01, 2011 11:18 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Regardless, I really hope this means Anno WAS sincere with his "Please wait a little longer" comment in June 2011 Newtype Japan. And I'm assuming whenever 3.33 would air on Japanese TV, there would be a similar format of actual versus mock-up footage for 4.0 (heh, I can only imagine what batshit insanity will be thrown at us there) .

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 01, 2011 11:29 pm Honestly I'm pretty excited right now, though this could very well be jumping the gun. Monk Ed wrote: Has there been any word yet that they've been separated into individual full-length movies? (We can only hope...)

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sat Jul 02, 2011 11:02 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: The information says "watch the ending" which is also what was mentioned when they changed 2.0's preview after 1.01 aired on Japanese TV: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/07/evangelion-1-01-on-ntv-this-friday/

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Jul 02, 2011 5:25 pm I'm not getting hopeful...

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Jul 02, 2011 5:39 pm Well, "watch the ending" could just be to make sure people don't miss the Kaworu epilogue. But I'm hoping for more of course.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sun Jul 03, 2011 2:28 am I doubt we'll get anything, I don't think they've even started animation on Q yet. GOOOOO PESSIMISM!

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Jul 03, 2011 3:07 am Fazmotron wrote: GOOOOO PESSIMISM!

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Sun Jul 03, 2011 4:31 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: It was aired by Rai (Italian national broadcaster) around that time. Viking has "North Adriatic Sea" as location, do you live in Italy?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Jul 03, 2011 4:35 am ^Thank you for the confirmation, I had few doubts considering your location but I was wondering if it has been aired somewhere else.

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Sun Jul 03, 2011 6:34 am Viking wrote: Yes. I live in Italy. I saw Eva 2.22 on January 1st, but if I remember correctly, it was aired for the first time 2 or 3 days before Christmas 2010, always on Rai 4.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Sun Jul 03, 2011 9:17 am I think all broadcast in Europe will be done by dubbing (I heard that American movies also mainly shown dubbed in theaters) ? I wonder what people think of the dubbing? And how does it compare with the English dub?

Perhaps they will announce some Q news then. Edit: actually, can someone translate this footnote better than I can? It seems to imply there will be something mentioned at the end of the movie after mentioning that when 1.0/序 played as the Friday night movie it was at the same time 2.0/破 was released in the theater and that since 破 is now being aired on TV that it will coincide with the restart (再起動) of the movie series (I think?). There's a note to make sure to watch to the end of the movie (but maybe that refers to the same Q preview that played in the theater): "前回『金曜ロードショー』で『序』を放送した時は、『破』の公開時期だったこともあり大変好評でした。今回の『破』のテレビ放送も『新劇場版』シリーズ再起動のきっかけになれればいいと考えています。劇場で見た方も必ず“ 最後まで ”ご覧ください！"
